title: qrafty's Halloween Villages
description: This pack fills Dark Forests with spooky, abandoned villages, eerie graveyards, and mysterious altars, adding a haunting atmosphere. Perfect for thrill-seekers ready to explore the forest’s dark secrets! 😶‍🌫️🎃
body:
# Villages in the spoooky dark forests. 🎃
This mod (or datapack) adds not only pumpkin farms, ruins and witchhouses, but also seven other haunting elements to the dark forests of your Minecraft world! Over 20+ Structures with balanced loot tables. 💀

![SOUL CABIN](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8647ddb5832f7b42374e660172eab1a7750d664.png)

**Including:** 20+ custom buildt structures generating random with each other. 😶‍🌫️

![DISCORD INVITE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a250108b13f3501a4d957024dd1abe6d2312a7c.png)
## [DISCORD INVITE](https://www.qrafty.net/discord)

**This pack is part of my main datapack [qraftyfied!](https://modrinth.com/datapack/qraftyfied)**


**Locate the villages by running:**
```
/locate structure qrafty:transilvania
```

_Future plans for an Pale Gardens update already exist!_
